summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Auto Insurance page at /auto-insurance. All 9 sections implemented correctly with proper responsive design, interactive accordion, and navigation from Quote Center.
passed_tests: Auto Insurance page loads at /auto-insurance route
Hero section with navy gradient and correct title 'Get Your Auto Insurance Quote'
Gold CTA button in hero section
Auto Insurance Guide 2-column layout with dealership image
Blue stats overlay showing '2000+ Clients Served' and '30+ Years in Service'
Contact info section with phone (562) 402-1737, email, and Cerritos office address
Why Choose Local Agent section with dark background and 4 subsections
Coverage Options accordion with 7 coverage types (Liability, Collision, Comprehensive, Uninsured, Medical, Rental, Roadside)
Commercial Auto section with delivery van image and two CTA buttons
Factors Affecting Rates section with 8 rate factors listed
Smart Ways to Save section with piggy bank image
Serving Southern California section with 6 county service areas
Quote Center Auto card correctly links to /auto-insurance
Mobile responsive design - all 2-column layouts stack at 375px width
All interactive elements accessible and functional on mobile
